sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100468" key="suneutrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνευτροφέω</orth>, <sense id="n100468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be well-nourished also</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
